# Cubiq - AI Context

Cubiq is a Product-oriented Software Factory, a Digital Platform for SMBs, and Backend-as-a-Service for Startups. AI-driven, managed by humans: we create, operate, and scale digital businesses in LATAM.

## Tech Stack

- Svelte & SvelteKit with TypeScript for web projects
- NestJS for APIs (self-hosted via Cloudflare tunnels)
- Supabase (managed PostgreSQL)
- Docker for deployment
- Tailscale for server orchestration
- Tauri (with SvelteKit) for desktop/mobile apps

## Products

- TapTapGO: Craft beer marketplace
- Betizen.org: Casino/iGaming affiliate site
- Forex Affiliate Product (in development)
- Appointment scheduling SaaS for beauty salons
- Payments API for LATAM

## Key Links

- Website: https://www.cubiq.lat
- API Docs: https://api.cubiq.lat/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/minimo-io
